description_long: This is a round, two-layered cake with a light brown exterior and a visible layer of red filling in the middle. The top of the cake is decorated with alternating pink and white swirled dollops of icing and is surrounded by eight lit candles. The cake is presented on a hexagonal, red-and-black checkered cloth, accompanied by a birthday card featuring a cup illustration and the words 'Happy Birthday', as well as a small set of colored markers and a black notebook. The overall scene suggests a celebratory occasion, likely a birthday, with the cake as the centerpiece. The cake's surface appears soft and matte, with a rustic, homemade aesthetic.
description: A two-layered, rustic birthday cake with pink and white icing dollops, lit candles, and a visible red filling, displayed on a checkered cloth with a birthday card and art supplies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cake, all candles, pink and white icing, the birthday card with 'Happy Birthday' text, and art supplies on the checkered cloth.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cake's layered structure, the open birthday card, and partial visibility of the art supplies behind the card.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the back of the open birthday card, with the cake and some candles partially visible, and art supplies more clearly seen.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the cake, all candles, the front of the birthday card, and the art supplies, emphasizing the celebratory arrangement.
